item.title: UK Government Puts AI at Cabinet Level as DSIT Is Dissolved, Raising Questions For Quantum Strategy
item.summary: Insider Brief The U.K. government has elevated artificial intelligence to the center of policymaking by giving its AI minister a seat in Cabinet while abolishing the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology, a restructuring that could have important implications for Britain’s quantum technology ambitions. According to the BBC, Prime Minister Andy Burnham has dismantled the […]
